节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Declare scroll status
Declare list item alignment status
The list items are packed toward the start edge of the List component along the cross axis.
The list items are centered in the List component along the cross axis.
The list items are packed toward the end edge of the List component along the cross axis.
Declare list item group area
The edge of the viewport is in the position of none.
The edge of the viewport is in the position of a list item.
The edge of the viewport is in the position of a header.
The edge of the viewport is in the position of a footer.
Declare item group sticky style.
In the ListItemGroup component, the header is not pinned to the top, and the footer is not pinned to the bottom.
In the ListItemGroup component, the header is pinned to the top, and the footer is not pinned to the bottom.
In the ListItemGroup component, the footer is pinned to the bottom, and the header is not pinned to the top.
In the ListItemGroup component, the header is pinned to the top, and the footer is pinned to the bottom.
Declare edge effect of chain animation.
Default edge effect. Compress the space in the drag direction and stretch the space in the opposite drag direction.
Stretch all space.
Declare limited position when scroll end.
No alignment. This is the default value.

The first item in the view is aligned at the start of the list.

NOTE
When the list hits the end, the items at the end must be completely displayed. In this case, the items at the start may not be aligned.

The middle items in the view are aligned in the center of the list.

NOTE
The top and end items can be aligned in the center of the list. In this case, a blank area may result, and the first or last item is aligned to the center of the list.

The last item in the view is aligned at the end of the list.

NOTE
When the list hits the start, the items at the start must be completely displayed. In this case, the items at the end may not be aligned.
Defines the chain animation options.
Minimum space for chain animation.
Maximum space for chain animation.
Conductivity of chain animation.
Intensity of chain animation.
Edge effect of chain animation.
Stiffness of chain spring.
Damping of chain spring.
Defines a UIListEvent which is used to set different common event to target component.
Set or reset the callback which is triggered when the List will scroll.
注释信息: @param { OnWillScrollCallback | undefined } callback - The callback will be triggered when the List will scroll.

parameters.说明: The callback will be triggered when the List will scroll.

节点.功能描述: Set or reset the callback which is triggered when List view did scroll.
注释信息: @param { OnScrollCallback | undefined } callback - callback function, triggered when the List view did scroll.

parameters.说明: callback function, triggered when the List view did scroll.

节点.功能描述: Set or reset the callback which is triggered when the start, end, or center positions of the display change. start, end, or center positions of the display change.

节点.功能描述: Defines the close swipe action options.
Triggered after the collapse animation is complete.
Defines the visible list content info.
Index of the list item or list item group in the list display area.
Position of the top or bottom edge of the viewport in the list item group to which the edge is located, if applicable.
Index of the starting or ending list item in the list item group to which the top or bottom edge of the viewport is located.

Obtains the size of a list item in a list item group and its position relative to the list.

NOTE:
- The value of index must be the index of a child component visible in the display area. Otherwise, the value is considered invalid.
- The child component for which index is set must be a list item group. Otherwise, the index value is considered invalid.
- The value of indexInGroup must be the index of a list item in the list item group visible in the display area. Otherwise, the value is considered invalid.
- When index or indexInGroup is set to an invalid value, the returned size and position are both 0.


1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } index - Index of the list item group in the list.
@param { number } indexInGroup - Index of the list item in the list item group.
@returns { RectResult } - Size of the list item in the list item group and its position relative to the list.
@throws { BusinessError } 100004 - Controller not bound to component.

parameters.说明: Index of the list item group in the list.
Index of the list item in the list item group.

节点.return_description: - Size of the list item in the list item group and its position relative to the list.

节点.功能描述:
Scrolls to the specified list item in the specified list item group.
NOTE
If the value set is a negative value or greater than the maximum index of the items in the container, the value is deemed abnormal, and no scrolling will be performed.
NOTE
If the value set is a negative value or greater than the maximum index of the items in the list item group, the value is deemed abnormal, and no scrolling will be performed. The value true means to enable that the smooth animation, and false means the opposite.
Default value: false
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { number } index - Index of the target list item group in the current container.
@param { number } indexInGroup - Index of the target list item in the list item group specified by index.
@param { boolean } smooth - Whether to enable the smooth animation for scrolling to the item with the specified index.

@param { ScrollAlign } align - How the list item to scroll to is aligned with the container.
Default value: ScrollAlign.START
@throws { BusinessError } 100004 - Controller not bound to component.

parameters.说明: Index of the target list item group in the current container.
Index of the target list item in the list item group specified by index.
Whether to enable the smooth animation for scrolling to the item with the specified index.

How the list item to scroll to is aligned with the container.
Default value: ScrollAlign.START

节点.功能描述:
Collapses the list items in the EXPANDED state and sets callback events.

NOTE:
- A ListScroller must be bound to the List component.


1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.

@throws { BusinessError } 100004 - Controller not bound to component.

parameters.说明: Callback events for collapsing list items in the EXPANDED state.

节点.功能描述:
Obtains the index information of the child component at the specified coordinates.

NOTE:
- If the provided value of x or y is invalid, the returned VisibleListContentInfo object has the index property set to -1, and both itemGroupArea and itemIndexInGroup are undefined.


1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @returns { VisibleListContentInfo } Index information of the child component at the specified coordinates.
@throws { BusinessError } 100004 - The controller not bound to component.

parameters.说明: X-coordinate, in vp.
Y-coordinate, in vp.

节点.return_description: Index information of the child component at the specified coordinates.

error_codes.description: The controller not bound to component.

节点.功能描述:
Defines the options of the List component.

NOTE:
- The default value of the universal attribute clip is true for the List component.

Index of the item to be displayed at the start when the list is initially loaded. Anonymous Object Rectification.

NOTE
If the set value is a negative number or is greater than the index of the last item in the list, the value is invalid. In this case, the default value will be used.

Spacing between list items along the main axis. Anonymous Object Rectification.

NOTE
If this parameter is set to a negative number or a value greater than or equal to the length of the list content area, the default value is used.
If this parameter is set to a value less than the width of the list divider, the width of the list divider is used as the spacing.
Child components of List whose visibility attribute is set to None are not displayed, but the spacing above and below them still takes effect.

Scroller, which can be bound to scrollable components. Anonymous Object Rectification.

NOTE
The scroller cannot be bound to other scrollable components.
The list interface is extended.
Called when interface data is called. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Defines the divider style of the list or list item group.
Width of the divider. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Color of the divider. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Distance between the divider and the start edge of the list. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Distance between the divider and the end edge of the list. Anonymous Object Rectification.
Sets the number of columns or rows in the list. If the value is set to the gutter type, it indicates the gap between columns. It takes effect when the number of columns is greater than 1.
注释信息:
@param { number | LengthConstrain } value - Number of columns or rows in the list.
Default value: 1

@param { Dimension } gutter - Gap between columns.
Default value: 0

parameters.说明:
Number of columns or rows in the list.
Default value: 1

Gap between columns.
Default value: 0

节点.功能描述: Alignment mode of list items along the cross axis when the cross-axis width of the list is greater than the cross-axis width of list items multiplied by the value of lanes.
注释信息:
@param { ListItemAlign } value - Alignment mode of list items along the cross axis.
Default value: ListItemAlign.Start

parameters.说明:
Alignment mode of list items along the cross axis.
Default value: ListItemAlign.Start

节点.功能描述: Sets the direction in which the list items are arranged.
注释信息:
@param { Axis } value - Direction in which the list items are arranged.
Default value: Axis.Vertical

parameters.说明:
Direction in which the list items are arranged.
Default value: Axis.Vertical

节点.功能描述:
Sets the scrollbar state.
NOTE
Default value: BarState.Auto

parameters.说明: Scrollbar state.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the effect used when the scroll boundary is reached.

NOTE:
- By default, this component can produce a bounce effect only when there is more than one screen of content. To produce a bounce effect when there is less than one screen of content, use the options parameter of the edgeEffect attribute.


Default value: EdgeEffect.Spring The value { alwaysEnabled: true } means to enable the scroll effect, and { alwaysEnabled: false } means the opposite.
Default value: { alwaysEnabled: false }
注释信息: @param { EdgeEffect } value - Effect used when the scroll boundary is reached. The spring and shadow effects are supported.
@param { EdgeEffectOptions } options - Whether to enable the scroll effect when the component content is smaller than the component itself.

parameters.说明: Effect used when the scroll boundary is reached. The spring and shadow effects are supported.
Whether to enable the scroll effect when the component content is smaller than the component itself.

节点.功能描述:

Default value: 0

@returns { ListAttribute } the attribute of the list.
